hooks.name: Check Known Issues Before Building
hooks.description: On prompt submit, reminds the agent to check known-issues.md for gotchas before building — the one thing conditional steering can't handle automatically.

action.prompt: If the user is asking you to create, build, or implement NCM API code (not just asking a question), check docs/known-issues.md for relevant gotchas before starting. If the user is asking a question, making a simple edit, or working on non-API code, skip this step.
